title: Zoro and Sanji Enter the Match
description: The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Zoro, Usopp. The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: while bamboo is aiming with his...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: with the power of a speeding bullet!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Bull's eye!! It's over for him!!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Do do do do do do do...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: the ball, Sanji, is in the air!!

summary: The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.
